slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Kereiti ya 11 - Mothati wa FET
slides.title: Bochaba: Afrika Boroa, Bochabela bo Hare le Afrika
slides.lead: Ho bapisa mekgatlo e mene ya bochaba - bochaba ba Maburu le ba Maafrika Afrika Boroa, le Zionism le bochaba ba Maarabia Bochabela bo Hare - ho botsa hore na bochaba bo ka kopanya setjhaba mme hape ba arola naha jang.

media.alt: Difolakga tse nne tse etselitsoeng tse phatlalatsang ho tloha lefatsheng le bohareng, tse emelang mekgatlo e mene ya bochaba e bapisoang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='34' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='34' fill='none' stroke='#4f5d3a' stroke-width='2'/><g stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='3'><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='60' y2='34'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='262' y2='34'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='60' y2='150'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='262' y2='150'/></g><rect x='40' y='22' width='34' height='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='246' y='22' width='34' height='22' fill='#1f3a8a'/><rect x='40' y='140' width='34' height='22' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='246' y='140' width='34' height='22' fill='#2f5233'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlophisa yuniti yohle e le thuto ya papiso, eseng dipale tse nne tse arohaneng. Bolela potso e bohareng ya histori: hobaneng bochaba - matla a fang batho boitsebiso, boikgantsho le tokoloho - hangata bo hlahisa khethollo le dikgohlano? Sheba esale pele sebopeho: pele hlalosa bochaba, ebe o hlahloba dinyeoe tse pedi tsa Afrika Boroa (Maburu le Maafrika), ebe dinyeoe tse pedi tsa Bochabela bo Hare (Zionism le bochaba ba Maarabia), o bapisa ha o ntse o tsamaya. Hopotsa baithuti hore histori e nngwe ya ena e ntse e phehisanoa haholo ebile e ntse e ama maikutlo le kajeno, kahoo re sebetsana le mehlodi ka hloko le ka tlhompho.

slides.title: Bochaba ke eng?
slides.lead: Bochaba ke tumelo ya hore sehlopha sa batho ba nang le boitsebiso bo tshwanang bo etsa 'setjhaba' se lokelang ho ba le naha ya sona, botshepehi le boipuso.

blocks.text: **Setjhaba** ke *setjhaba se nahanoang*: litho tsa sona ha li ke li kopane le baahi-mmoho ba bona ba bangata, empa ba ikutlwa ba le mmoho. **Bochaba** bo fetola maikutlo ao ho ba tleleimo ya dipolotiki - tokelo ya ho ipusa naheng ya bona.

Bo-rahistori hangata ba arola mefuta e mmedi. **Bochaba ba boahi (civic nationalism)** bo hlalosa setjhaba ka boahi bo tshwanang, melao le boleng, kahoo mang kapa mang a ka kena. **Bochaba ba morabe (ethnic nationalism)** bo bo hlalosa ka tsoalo e tshwanang, puo, bolumeli kapa setso, tse ka qhelelang ba kantle thoko. Mekgatlo e mengata ya nnete e kopanya bobedi.

items: Hangata bo itshetlehile puong e tshwanang, bolumeling, historing kapa maikutlong a bokhalo bo tshwanang.
Hangata bo hlohlelletswa kapa ba tiisoa ke pelaelo e tshwanang - tlholeho, bofuma, khethollo kapa puso ya basele.
Bo aha bonngwe ka ho hlalosa 'rona', empa ha bo etsa jwalo bo boetse bo hlalosa 'bona'.

slides.notes: Fa baithuti mantswe a tlhahlobo ao ba tla a sebedisa yunithing yohle e setseng: setjhaba, bochaba, boipuso, bochaba ba boahi kgahlano le ba morabe, le kgopolo ya Benedict Anderson ya 'setjhaba se nahanoang'. Hatisa hore bochaba ha bo botle feela kapa ha bo bobe feela - bo ile ba susumetsa topollo khahlano le bokoloni mme ba boetse ba susumetsa khethollo le apartheid. Tsebo e rutoang ke papiso: kgopolo e tshwanang, maemo a fapaneng.

slides.title: Dipotso tse hlano tseo o lokelang ho di botsa bochabeng bofe kapa bofe
slides.lead: Sebedisa lense e tshwanang mokgatlong o mong le o mong hore o kgone ho di bapisa ka toka.

blocks.heading: Mang?
blocks.text: Ke mang ya baloang e le karolo ya setjhaba - mme ke mang ya siuoang thoko?

blocks.heading: Hobaneng jwale?
blocks.text: Ke pelaelo kapa mathata afe a hlohlelelitseng mokgatlo?

blocks.heading: Jwang?
blocks.text: Baetapele ba ile ba susumetsa batho jwang - setso, bolumeli, mekgatlo, ketso ya bongata?

blocks.heading: Naha?
blocks.text: Ke sebaka sefe seo ba neng ba se batla, mme ke mang e mong ya neng a se batla?

blocks.heading: Sephetho?
blocks.text: Na bo ile ba tlisa topollo, bobusi bo matla, dikgohlano - kapa tsona tsohle tse tharo?

slides.notes: Ona ke moralo wa papiso oo baithuti ba lokelang ho o sebedisa bochabeng ba Maburu, bochabeng ba Maafrika, Zionism le bochabeng ba Maarabia ka tatellano. Ba kgothaletse ho boloka kerata ya papiso dibukeng tsa bona e nang le dikholomo tsena tse hlano. Bontsha hore potso ya 'Naha?' ke moo dinyeoe tse pedi di fetohang tse bohloko: Afrika Boroa le Israele/Palestina ka bobedi, mekgatlo e mmedi ya bochaba e ile ya batla sebaka se tshwanang.

slides.title: Bochaba ba Maburu: tlholeho, bofuma le tsoso
slides.lead: Bochaba ba Maburu bo hlahile tlhompalong ntweng ya Afrika Boroa (1899-1902) le bofumeng boo Maburu a mangata a ileng a tobana le bona kamora moo.

blocks.text: Ho hlolwa ke Brithani, lefu la basadi le bana dikampeng tsa kwallo (concentration camps), le tahlehelo ya direpabliki tsa Maburu ho ile ha siya Maburu a mangata a ikutlwa hore setjhaba sa bona (volk) se ne se le kotsing. Mashomeng a lilemo a latelang, ba dikete tse mashome ba ile ba fetoha 'makgowa a futsanehileng', ba sutumelletsoa ntle ho naha ho kena metseng e meholo.

Baetapele ba ile ba sebedisa **puo, bolumeli le histori** ho aha boikgantsho bocha. Seafrikanse se ile sa hlophisoa le ho phatlalatsoa; Kereke ya Dutch Reformed e ile ya hatisa hore Maburu ke setjhaba se kgethiloeng; mme pale ya Leeto le Leholo (Great Trek) ya fetoha tshomo ya motheo ya setjhaba se loanelang tokoloho.

items: **Afrikaner Broederbond** (e thehiloeng ka 1918) e ile ya aha marang-rang a sephiri ho ntshetsa pele dithahasello tsa Maburu dipolotiking, khwebong le setsong.
Mekgatlo ya setso le sehopotso sa lilemo tse lekgolo sa Leeto le Leholo ka 1938 di ile tsa hlohlelletsa maikutlo a bongata.
**National Party** e ile ya lebisa boitsebiso bona teketekong ya matla a puso.

media.alt: Seriti sa koloi ya dikgomo ka tlas'a letsatsi le tjhabang, se hopotsang Leeto le Leholo le sebedisitsoeng e le letshwao la bochaba.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='170' cy='58' r='26' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#5a4a2a'><rect x='60' y='92' width='70' height='24'/><path d='M60 92 l14 -16 h44 l12 16 Z'/></g><circle cx='74' cy='120' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='120' cy='120' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='130' y1='104' x2='168' y2='100' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa kamoo maikutlo a ho ba lehlatsipa a ileng a fetoloa lenaneo la dipolotiki. Mokgwa wa bohlokwa: pelaelo (tlholeho, bofuma ba makgowa a futsanehileng) le tsususmetso ya setso (puo, kereke, tshomo ya histori, Broederbond) di lekana le mokgatlo wa bongata. Sehopotso sa lilemo tse lekgolo sa Leeto le Leholo ka 1938 ke mohlala o motle wa moetlo o etselitsoeng. [SME] Sebetsana le sehopotso sa dikampo tsa kwallo ka hloko le ka nepo; se teng sebele historing mme se ile sa sebedisoa hamorao ka dipolotiki. Hlokomedisa hore bona ke bochaba ba morabe bo hlalosoang ka tsoalo, puo le bolumeli.

slides.title: 1948: Bochaba ba Maburu bo hapa 'muso
slides.lead: Ka 1948 National Party e ile ya hapa matla mme ya fetola bochaba ba Maburu leano la semmuso la apartheid.

blocks.text: E etelletsoe pele ke **D.F. Malan**, National Party e ile ya hapa dikgetho tsa 1948 tsa makgowa feela ka tshepiso ya *apartheid* ('ho arohana'). Bochaba ba Maburu jwale bo ne bo laola 'muso mme ba o sebedisa ho sireletsa mesebetsi ya Maburu, puo le matla - le ho qobella bobusi ba makgowa hodima bongata ba batho ba batsho.

items: 'Muso o ile wa atolosa thuto ya Seafrikanse, tshebeletso ya setjhaba le diindasteri tsa 'muso ho phahamisa Maburu.
Melao ya apartheid e ile ya arola batho ka morabe mme ya boloka matla le ditokelo bakeng sa makgowa.
Ena ke nyeoe ya bochaba bo fumaneng boipuso bakeng sa sehlopha se le seng ka ho bo hana ho ba bang.

media.alt: Kerafo ya dibaar e phahamang ka pel'a moaho wa 'muso, e bontshang sehlopha se le seng se fumana matla ka ditshenyehelo tsa ba bang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='36' width='120' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M54 36 q36 -22 72 0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='42' y='48' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='130' y='48' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><rect x='160' y='108' width='16' height='28'/><rect x='182' y='88' width='16' height='48'/><rect x='204' y='60' width='16' height='76'/></g><rect x='28' y='136' width='196' height='6' fill='#5a4a2a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa ntlha ya tlhahlobo ka ho hlaka: bochaba ba Maburu bo ile ba 'atleha' ka 1948, empa katleho ya bona e ne e le khatello ya batho ba bang. Sena se hlophisa kgohlano e tobileng le bochaba ba Maafrika. Kgutlela morao moralong: Ke mang ya neng a kenyeleditsoe? (Maburu, ebe makgowa.) Ke mang ya neng a qheletsoe thoko? (Bongata ba batho ba batsho.) Hlokomela hore apartheid e ne e le karolo ya morero wa ho theha mesebetsi le ho phahamisa Maburu a futsanehileng, se thusang ho hlalosa hore hobaneng e ne e ratoa ke setjhaba sa yona.

slides.title: Bochaba ba Maafrika: bonngwe kgahlano le khethollo
slides.lead: Bochaba ba Maafrika bo hlahile e le karabelo ho hapuoa, tahlehelo ya naha le ho qheleloa thoko Kopanong ya Afrika Boroa (Union of South Africa) e thehiloeng ka 1910.

blocks.text: Kopano ya Afrika Boroa (1910) e ile ya kopanya makgowa empa ya kwalla Maafrika ntle ho matla a dipolotiki. Ka 1912 baetapele ba Maafrika ba rutehileng ba ile ba theha **South African Native National Congress** - e ileng ya reelloa **African National Congress (ANC)** ka 1923 - ho kopanya Maafrika ho theola meedi ya morabe le ya libaka le ho batla ditokelo setjhabeng se le seng se tshwanang.

**Molao wa Naha wa Batho ba Sehlaha wa 1913 (Natives Land Act)**, o neng o boloketse makgowa boholo ba naha, o ile wa bontsha hobaneng bonngwe bo ne bo hlokahala ka potlako. Bochaba ba pele ba Maafrika bo ne bo le bonolo: bo ne bo sebedisa dikopo tse ngotsoeng, baromuoa le molao ho kopa ho kenyeletsoa.

items: Bo ne bo ikemiseditse ho hlola dikarohano tsa morabe le ho aha setjhaba se le seng sa Maafrika, mme hamorao se sa kgetholleng ka morabe, sa Afrika Boroa.
Bo ne bo hlalosa setjhaba ka boahi bo tshwanang le ditokelo - pono e leng ya boahi haholoanyane.
Mekgwa ya yona ya pele e ne e latela molao-motheo; kgangaruo e ne e tla e susumetsa hamorao ho ketso ya bongata.

media.alt: Ditshwantsho tse nyane tse ngata tsa dibopeho tse fapaneng di tshwarana ka matsoho ho theha selikalikoe se le seng, se emelang bonngwe har'a dihlopha.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='120' cy='40' r='11'/><circle cx='176' cy='62' r='11'/><circle cx='176' cy='108' r='11'/><circle cx='120' cy='130' r='11'/><circle cx='64' cy='108' r='11'/><circle cx='64' cy='62' r='11'/></g><circle cx='120' cy='85' r='52' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' stroke-dasharray='6 6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bapisa mohopolo wa motheo le bochaba ba Maburu: bochaba ba Maafrika bo ne bo batla ho aha bonngwe har'a dihlopha tse ngata tsa morabe tsa Maafrika (MaZulu, MaXhosa, Basotho le ba bang) haholo-holo ho hanyetsa 'muso o neng o ba qhelela thoko. Hatisa pono e leng ya boahi haholoanyane, e kenyeletsang - ANC qetellong e ile ya ya ho ho se kgetholla ka morabe. Hlokomela ntho e makatsang eo yuniti e nnang e kgutlela ho yona: mekgatlo e mmedi ya bochaba ya Afrika Boroa, e mong o batla bobusi, e mong o batla ho kenyeletsa, e thulana hodima naha e tshwanang.

slides.title: Moloko o motjha: ANC Youth League
slides.lead: Ho fihla lilemong tsa bo-1940 moloko o motjha o ne o batla bochaba ba Maafrika bo sebete le bo thehiloeng hodima bongata.

blocks.text: Ba tenehile ke mashome a lilemo a dikopo tse nang le hlompho, baetapele ba batjha ba ile ba theha **ANC Youth League** ka 1944. Mopresidente wa yona wa pele, **Anton Lembede**, o ile a hlokomedisa hore Maafrika a tlameha ho itokolla ka boikgantsho, boipheliso le mokgatlo wa bongata ho ena le ho emela mosa wa makgowa.
Afrika ke naha ya motho e motsho... Maafrika ke a le mong. Ho tsoa merabeng e fapaneng ho tlameha ho hlaha setjhaba se le seng se tshwanang.
blocks.cite: Anton Lembede, 'Some Basic Principles of African Nationalism', 1945

items: Lenaneo la Ketso la 1949 (Programme of Action) la Youth League le ile la amohela dikoetliso tsa mosebetsi (strikes), diboikoto le ho se mamele molao ka boomo (civil disobedience).
Batho ba kang Nelson Mandela, Walter Sisulu le Oliver Tambo ba ile ba phahama mekgahlelong ya yona.
Bochaba bona ba Maafrika bo sebete bo ne bo tla susumetsa ntwa ya bongata kgahlano le apartheid lilemong tsa bo-1950.

slides.notes: Sebedisa temana ya Lembede ho bontsha bohareng ba maikutlo ba bochaba ba Maafrika - boipheliso le bonngwe ho theola meedi ya morabe - ha o ntse o hlokomela hore moetlo o ka sehloohong wa ANC le wona o ile wa ya ho ho se kgetholla ka morabe (hamorao Freedom Charter). [SME] Bo-Afrikanism ba Lembede e ne e le lehlakore le le leng; ANC e ne e na le ngangisano pakeng tsa bo-Afrikanism bo qhelelang thoko le ho se kgetholla ho kenyeletsang, ho ileng ha hlahisa karohano ya PAC (1959) hamorao. Boloka phapang: bochaba ba Maafrika e ne e se ntho e le nngwe feela. Hokela pele: moloko ona o etella pele Letsholo la Boipelaetso (Defiance Campaign) leo Kereiti ya 9 e le hlahlobileng.

slides.title: Mekgatlo e mmedi ya bochaba, naha e le nngwe
slides.lead: Bochaba ba Maburu le ba Maafrika bo ile ba hola bo bapane, bo bong bo bopa bo bong.

items: Bo tsoa tlholong ke Brithani le bofumeng ba makgowa a futsanehileng.
Ba morabe: bo hlalosoa ka tsoalo, Seafrikanse le kereke.
Sepheo: boipuso le tshireletso bakeng sa setjhaba sa Maburu (volk).
Bo hapile 'muso ka 1948 mme ba aha apartheid.
Bo iphumantse tokoloho ka ho busa ba bang ka matla.
Bo tsoa ho hapuoeng, tahlehelong ya naha le khethollong.
Sepheo sa boahi: ho kopanya dihlopha tse ngata setjhabeng se le seng.
Sepheo: ditokelo tse lekanang le boipuso ba bongata.
Bo ile ba fetoha ntwa ya bongata ho tloha lilemong tsa bo-1940-50.
Bo ile ba batla tokoloho ka ho kenyeletsa, eseng ka bobusi bo matla.

slides.notes: Emisa mona bakeng sa boiketso ba papiso bo hlophisitsoeng. Kopa baithuti ho hlwaya ditshwano (ka bobedi bo ile ba sebedisa histori, setso le mokgatlo ho susumetsa; ka bobedi bo ile ba batla boipuso) le diphapang (e mong o qhelela thoko ebile o busa, e mong o kenyeletsa ebile o qheletsoe thoko). Hatisa tshebedisano: khatello ya bochaba ba Maburu e ile ya matlafatsa bochaba ba Maafrika, mme kganyetso ya Maafrika e ile ya tiisa bochaba ba Maburu. Ho bopana hona ho hobeli ke temoso ya bohlokwa ya boemo bo hodimo bakeng sa FET.

slides.title: Zionism: naha ya bokhalo bakeng sa batho ba Bajuda
slides.lead: Zionism e ne e le mokgatlo wa bochaba o neng o kopa naha ya bokhalo ya Bajuda, haholo e le karabelo ho makgolo a lilemo a mahloriso Yuropa.

blocks.text: A tobane le lehloyo le mabifi kgahlano le Bajuda (anti-Semitism) - dipolao tse boima (pogroms) 'Musong wa Russia le Taba ya Dreyfus (Dreyfus Affair) Fora - **Theodor Herzl** o ile a phehella bukeng ya *The Jewish State* (1896) hore Bajuda ba tla bolokeha feela ha ba na le naha ya bona. Kopano ya Pele ya Zionist (First Zionist Congress) e ile ya kopana Basel ka 1897, mme ho falla ha Bajuda ho ya Palestina ha eketseha.

**Phatlalatsong ya Balfour (Balfour Declaration, 1917)** Brithani e ile ya phatlalatsa tshehetso ya 'lehae la setjhaba bakeng sa batho ba Bajuda' Palestina - naha eo ka nako eo e neng e le ya Maarabia haholo. Brithani e ile ya busa Palestina tlas'a taelo ya League of Nations kamora 1920, mme dikgang pakeng tsa ditjhaba tsa Bajuda le Maarabia tsa phahama.

items: Zionism e ile ya kopanya boitsebiso ba morabe le ba bolumeli le tleleimo ya sejwale-jwale ya ho ba naha e ikemetseng.
E ne e susumetsoa ke mahloriso a nnete le a bolayang, ka holim'a tsohle Polao e Sehloho ya Bajuda (Holocaust) ya 1941-1945.
Empa naha eo e neng e e batla e ne e se e le lehae la baahi ba Maarabia ba nang le maikutlo a bona a bochaba.

media.alt: Naledi e nang le dintlha tse tsheletseng ka holim'a moralo wa leralla, e emelang pitso ya Zionist ya naha ya bokhalo ya Bajuda.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='none' stroke='#1f3a8a' stroke-width='6' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M120 34 L146 94 L86 58 L154 58 L94 94 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlahisa Zionism e le karabelo ho mahloriso a nnete, a bolayang, a fihlang sehlohlolong Polaong e Sehloho ya Bajuda (Holocaust) - baithuti ba tlameha ho utlwisisa hobaneng Bajuda ba bangata ba ile ba etsa qeto ya hore ba hloka naha ya bona. Ka nako e tshwanang, hlaka ka dintlha hore Palestina e ne e se e ahiloe, haholo ke Maarabia, kahoo naha e tshwanang e ne e na le ditleleimo tse pedi. [SME] Ena ke histori e ammang haholo e phehisanoang; boloka dinnete tse dumellanoang ke bongata (Herzl, Basel 1897, Balfour 1917, Taelo ya Brithani) mme o qobe ho ema ka lehlakore. Bontsha ho hlahloba mohlodi: Phatlalatso ya Balfour le yona e ile ya tshepisa ho se senye ditokelo tsa 'ditjhaba tse seng tsa Bajuda tse teng'.

slides.title: 1948: boipuso le koduo
slides.lead: Ketsahalo e tshwanang ya 1948 e hopoloa ke ditjhaba tse pedi ka ditsela tse fapaneng ka ho felletseng.

blocks.text: Kamora Polao e Sehloho ya Bajuda (Holocaust) le dikgohlano tse ntseng di phahama, Machaba a Kopaneng a ile a vouta ka 1947 ho arola Palestina naheng ya Bajuda le ya Maarabia. Ka la **14 Motsheanong 1948** baetapele ba Bajuda ba ile ba phatlalatsa **Naha ya Israele (State of Israel)**. Ntwa le dinaha tsa boahisani tsa Maarabia ya latela hang-hang.

Ma-Israele a hopola 1948 e le **Ntwa ya bona ya Boipuso (War of Independence)** - katleho ya naha ya bokhalo e bolokehileng. Ma-Palestina a e hopola e le **Nakba** ('koduo'): ka tekanyetso Maarabia a Palestina a 700 000 a ile a baleha kapa a lelekoa mme a se ke a lumelloa ho kgutla. Naha e le nngwe, ditjhaba tse pedi, mehopolo e mmedi e ke keng ya boelanngoa.

items: Ho setjhaba se seng, 1948 e ne e bolela boipuso le ho phela.
Ho se seng, e ne e bolela ho amohuoa le botlamuoa (exile).
Kgohlano ena e sa rarolloang e ntse e bopa Bochabela bo Hare le kajeno.

media.alt: Sebaka se le seng se arotsoeng ke mola o otlolohileng, lehlakore le leng le phahama le le leng le tsamaya, se emelang mehopolo e mmedi e fapaneng ya 1948.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='16' y='30' width='96' height='100' fill='#a8bcae'/><rect x='128' y='30' width='96' height='100' fill='#d8c6a8'/><rect x='116' y='24' width='8' height='112' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#1f3a8a'><path d='M64 60 L74 84 L54 70 L86 70 L66 84 Z'/></g><g fill='#5a4a2a'><circle cx='160' cy='72' r='7'/><rect x='153' y='80' width='14' height='24'/><path d='M172 88 h22 l-8 -8 v16 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Sena ke slaete e ammang ka ho fetisisa dekeng ena; e rute e le thuto ya pono le sehopotso sa histori. Hlahisa mabitso ka bobedi a 1948 a bapane ntle le ho a beha maemong, mme o sebedise puo ya 'e hopoloang e le'. [SME] Dipalo le disosa tsa ho baleha ha Ma-Palestina di phehisanoa ka nnete ke bo-rahistori (ho baleha kgahlano le ho lelekoa); hlahisa palo ya ~700,000 e le tekanyetso mme o hlokomele ngangisano. Sepheo sa thuto ke kutlwelo-bohloko le tlhahlobo ya mohlodi: ketsahalo e tshwanang e nang le letsatsi e hlahisa dipale tse pedi tsa bochaba. Memela puisano e kgutsitseng, e nang le tlhompho, mme o behe melao ya motheo pele.

slides.eyebrow: Bochabela bo Hare / Afrika - nyeoe ya 4
slides.title: Bochaba ba Maarabia: bonngwe le boipuso
slides.lead: Bochaba ba Maarabia bo ne bo batla ho lokolla batho ba buang Searabia pusong ya basele mme, ho ba bang, ho ba kopanya setjhabeng se le seng.

blocks.text: Ha 'Muso wa Ottoman (Ottoman Empire) o putlama kamora Ntwa ya Lefatshe ya Pele, dinaha tsa Maarabia di ile tsa aroloa ka ditaelo tsa Brithani le Fora. Bochaba ba Maarabia bo ile ba hloya taolo ena ya basele le meedi e neng e thadiloe ke MaYuropa, mme ba eketsa khahlano le bolulo ba Zionist Palestina.

Mokgatlo o ile wa fihla sehlohlolong tlas'a **Gamal Abdel Nasser** wa Egepeta. Ha Nasser a **etsa Kanale ya Suez (Suez Canal) ya 'muso ka 1956** mme a hanyetsa tlhaselo ya Brithani, Fora le Israele, o ile a fetoha mohale lefatsheng lohle la Maarabia le letshwao la mekgatlo e khahlano le bokoloni Afrika le Asia ka bophara.

items: Bo ne bo thehiloe hodima puo e tshwanang ya Searabia, setso le (ho ba bangata) Islamo.
**Pan-Arabism** e ne e lorela ho kopanya Maarabia ohle, e kopanya Egepeta le Syria ka nakwana ka 1958.
Bo ne bo le khahlano le bokoloni ka matla mme ba susumetsa dintwa tsa boipuso tsa Afrika.

media.alt: Ketane e robehileng ka holim'a kanale e etselitsoeng, e emelang bochaba ba Maarabia bo khahlano le bokoloni le Mathata a Suez (Suez Crisis).
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='104' y='30' width='32' height='108' fill='#4f7fae'/><g fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='72' cy='58' r='14'/><circle cx='96' cy='72' r='14'/></g><g fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='168' cy='58' r='14'/><circle cx='144' cy='72' r='14'/></g><line x1='108' y1='66' x2='132' y2='66' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-dasharray='4 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bontsha bochaba ba Maarabia e le mokgatlo o mong o khahlano le bokoloni, o hokelang nyeoe ya Bochabela bo Hare morao le Afrika (sehlooho sa CAPS se akaretsa ka bobedi). Nasser le Suez 1956 ke ntlha ya sehloohong: matla a manyane a hanyetsang beng ba mehleng ba bokoloni a ile a phahamisa lefatshe le tlosang bokoloni, ho kenyeletsoa Afrika e ka boroa ho Sahara. Hlokomela kgang ka har'a bochaba ba Maarabia pakeng tsa bonngwe ba pan-Arab le dinaha tse arohaneng, le hore khahlano le Zionism e ne e le e nngwe ya disosa tse kopanyang. Hokela matla a khahlano le bokoloni bochabeng ba Maafrika bo ithutoeng pejana.

slides.title: Mekgatlo e mmedi ya bochaba, naha e le nngwe
slides.lead: Jwaloka Afrika Boroa, Bochabela bo Hare bo ile ba bona mekgatlo e mmedi ya bochaba e batla sebaka se tshwanang.

items: Karabelo ho lehloyo la Bajuda Yuropa (anti-Semitism) le Polao e Sehloho ya Bajuda (Holocaust).
Ya morabe-bolumeli: naha ya bokhalo bakeng sa batho ba Bajuda.
Sepheo: naha ya Bajuda e bolokehileng Palestina.
Bo ile ba fumana boipuso ba naha ka 1948 (Israele).
Katleho ya yona e ile ya falatsa baahi ba Maarabia ba Palestina.
Karabelo ho ho putlama ha Ottoman le puso ya bokoloni ya Yuropa.
Bo thehiloe hodima puo le setso se tshwanang sa Searabia.
Sepheo: boipuso le (ho ba bang) bonngwe ba Maarabia.
Bo ile ba fihla sehlohlolong ka Nasser le Mathata a Suez a 1956.
Bo ile ba hanyetsa Zionism mme ba susumetsa Afrika e khahlano le bokoloni.

slides.notes: Etsa boitlwaetso bo tshwanang ba papiso jwaloka slaete ya Afrika Boroa. Ebe o etsa hokelo pakeng tsa dinyeoe ho hlaka: Afrika Boroa le Palestina ka bobedi di bontsha mekgatlo e mmedi ya bochaba e thulanang hodima sebaka se le seng, e hlahisang kgohlano e telele, e bohloko. Kopa baithuti ho bapisa eseng feela Zionism kgahlano le bochaba ba Maarabia, empa le bochaba ba Maburu kgahlano le Zionism (ka bobedi ke bongata bo botlaseng bo batlang tshireletso le bobusi) le bochaba ba Maafrika kgahlano le bochaba ba Maarabia (ka bobedi mekgatlo ya bongata e khahlano le bokoloni). Papiso ena ya mahlakore a mane ke hantle-ntle monahano wa boemo bo hodimo oo CAPS e o putsang.

slides.title: Bochaba: matla a kopanyang le a arolang
slides.lead: Ho pholletsa le dinyeoe tsohle tse nne, bochaba bo ile ba fa batho boitsebiso le tokoloho - mme ba thala meedi e ileng ya lebisa dikgohlanong.

blocks.alt: Lethathamo la nako la meeja ya bohlokwa ya bochaba ho tloha 1897 ho isa 1958 ho pholletsa le Afrika Boroa le Bochabela bo Hare.

events.label: Kopano ya Pele ya Zionist, Basel
SANNC (hamorao ANC) e thehoa Afrika Boroa
Phatlalatso ya Balfour ka 'lehae la setjhaba' la Bajuda
ANC Youth League e matlafatsa bochaba ba Maafrika
National Party e hapa matla; Naha ya Israele e phatlalatsoa / Nakba
Nasser le Mathata a Suez: sehlohlolo sa bochaba ba Maarabia

slides.notes: Tiisa ka lethathamo lena le arolelanoang e le hore baithuti ba bone mekgatlo e mene e iphetha nakong e tshwanang, e susumetsana (khahlano le bokoloni e ile ya jala mehopolo ho theola meedi). Hlahisa khang ya ho qetela: bochaba ke matla a nang le mahlakore a mabeli - bo ile ba matlafatsa topollo ho bokoloni le apartheid, empa moo ditjhaba tse pedi di neng di batla naha e le nngwe bo ile ba hlahisa ho amohuoa le kgohlano e sa feleng. Hlokomela 1948 e le selemo se makatsang sa mokgwapa se hlahang dinyeoeng tse pedi tse fapaneng ka nako e le nngwe.

slides.title: Tlhahlobo: ho bapisa mekgatlo ya bochaba
slides.lead: Sebedisa moralo wa dipotso tse hlano le dipapiso ho araba dipotso tse ka tlase.

blocks.text: Thutong ena re hlalositse bochaba, ra khetholla bochaba ba **boahi (civic)** ho bo ba **morabe (ethnic)**, mme ra bapisa mekgatlo e mene: bochaba ba **Maburu** le ba **Maafrika** Afrika Boroa, le **Zionism** le bochaba ba **Maarabia** Bochabela bo Hare. Libakeng tsena ka bobedi mekgatlo e mmedi ya bochaba e ile ya batla naha e tshwanang, ka diphello tse kgolo.

blocks.question: Hlalosa phapang pakeng tsa bochaba ba boahi le ba morabe, o sebedisa mohlala o LE MONG wa Afrika Boroa le o LE MONG wa Bochabela bo Hare.
Bapisa ditshimoloho tsa bochaba ba Maburu le bochaba ba Maafrika. Bua ka bonyane ditshwano tse pedi le diphapang tse pedi.

'Diketsahalo tsa 1948 di ne di bolela tokoloho ho setjhaba se seng le tahlehelo ho se seng.' O sebedisa mohlala wa Afrika Boroa KAPA wa Israele-Palestina, buisana ka kamoo motsotso o le mong wa histori o ka hopoloang ka ditsela tse fapaneng.

slides.notes: Sebedisa dipotso tse tharo e le mosebetsi o ngotsoeng kapa ngangisano ya sehlopha e hlophisitsoeng; kabo ya matshwao e etsisa mekgwa ya CAPS ya ho ngola ho atolositsoeng le e thehiloeng hodima mehlodi. Potso ya 3 e hlahloba ka ho hlaka tsebo ya ho utlwisisa sehopotso se phehisanoang le pono, se leng bohareng ba sehlooho sena. Hopotsa baithuti ho phehella ho tsoa bopaking le ho emela lehlakore le leng le le leng ka toka. [SME] Pele o hlahloba thuto ya Israele/Palestina, netefatsa hore tataiso ya lefapha ya ho ruta sehlooho sena se phehisanoang e latetsoe le hore mehlodi e mengata e fanoe.
